mapper.sql: id as id, entrust_range as entrustRange, entrust_type as entrustType, entrust_source as entrustSource, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, org_id as orgId, owner_id as ownerId, purchase_sale_org_id as purchaseSaleOrg, warehouse_provider_id as warehouseProvider, stock_org_id as stockOrg, warehouse_id as warehouse_id, logistics_provider_id as logisticsProvider, logistics_org_id as logisticsOrg, pay_receive_org_id as payReceiveOrg, settment_org_id as settmentOrg, account_org_id as accountOrg, business_org_id as businessOrg, ori_acc_code as oriAccCode, relevance_logistics_provider_id as relevanceLogisticsProvider, relevance_logistics_org_id as relevanceLogisticsOrg, created_by as createdBy, created_date as createdDate, modified_by as modifiedBy, modified_date as modifiedDate
mapper.select: SELECT count(DISTINCT(logistics_org_id)) FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE state = 1 and entrust_type = 4

SELECT DISTINCT org.id as id, org.org_type as orgType, org.org_code as orgCode, org.org_name as orgName , org.main_org_flag as mainOrgFlag FROM base_entrust_relationship rel left join base_organization org on rel.logistics_org_id=org.id WHERE rel.state = 1 and rel.entrust_type = 4

SELECT DISTINCT org.id AS orgId, org.org_type AS orgType, org.org_code AS orgCode, org.org_name AS orgName, org.group_id AS groupId, rel.logistics_provider_id AS logisticsProviderId FROM base_entrust_relationship rel LEFT JOIN base_organization org ON rel.stock_org_id = org.id WHERE rel.state = 1 AND rel.entrust_type = 4 AND rel.stock_org_id = #{queryParam.stockOrg} AND rel.warehouse_id = #{queryParam.warehouseId}
